content.title: n8n.io
content.summary: - Workflow automation platform for technical teams, supports code and visual builders.
content.body:
# n8n.io

## Facts
- Workflow automation platform for technical teams, including IT Ops, Sec Ops, Dev Ops
- Combines visual workflow builder with code nodes (JavaScript, Python)
- Over 500 integrations with apps and services
- Enterprise-ready with on-prem, security features (SSO, LDAP, encrypted secrets), AI governance

## Data
- 180k+ GitHub stars
- 200k+ community members
- Case Study: Huel saved 1,000 hours of manual work
- Case Study: Vodafone saved £2.2 million in threat intelligence

## Relations
- Competitors: Zapier, Make
- Integrations: Slack, Salesforce, MySQL, GitHub, Jira, etc.

## Evidence
From n8n.io (2023-10-15):
"Top 50 Github. Our 180k stars place us among the most popular projects."
Testimonial quotes from Ollie Scheers (CTO Huel), Claire Van Hinsbergh (Vodafone), and others.
